CustomField.label: Passed Checks Display
CustomField.description: Controls what happens to checks that PASS. Show each row keeps them listed. Hide rows, show count only removes the passed rows from the list; their count still appears in the summary bar at the bottom of the card.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Show each row = list every passed check. Hide rows, show count only = remove passed rows from the list (the count still shows in the summary bar at the bottom of the card).
